research_goal: Understand why PMs at early-stage startups struggle with discovery research.
personalized_opening: Derek, I saw your note about replacing long research cycles with weekly customer conversations.

questions.primary: What makes discovery research difficult for your team right now?
questions.rationale_gap: Establish the broad pain landscape before narrowing on workflow, tooling, or incentives.
probes: Which part takes the most time?
Where do things usually get dropped?

questions.primary: How do you prepare for a discovery call today?
questions.rationale_gap: Understand whether preparation is structured, ad hoc, or skipped.
probes: What sources do you check before a call?
Who contributes to the interview guide?

questions.primary: What happens to notes and transcripts after a customer interview?
questions.rationale_gap: Identify where synthesis succeeds or fails after the conversation ends.
probes: How do they influence the next interview?
